claim_boundary: This workplan prepares regulatory, certification, and procurement readiness scaffolding only. It does not claim certification, compliance, government approval, procurement approval, legal sufficiency, financial/tax approval, production monitoring, or truth validation.
purpose: Define the safe readiness scope and standards/procurement map for future diligence.

reference_categories.safe_position: Can map internal controls conceptually; not claiming certification or formal compliance.
Can prepare documentation categories; not claiming regulator approval.
Can prepare diligence packet index; lawyer/CPA/security review required before real submission.
Professional-readiness package exists; not a CPA audit or legal opinion.

safe_overall_claim: SpecShift is building documentation and evidence scaffolds to support future professional, procurement, certification, or regulatory diligence. It is not certified, regulator-approved, procurement-approved, or compliance-certified.
scope_statement: SpecShift will prepare documentation and evidence categories that a regulator, certification body, insurer, enterprise buyer, lawyer, CPA, or security reviewer may request. This is preparation only, not a claim of compliance or certification.
